body.sql: SELECT *, `events_total` AS `_value_`, `dtEventTimeStamp` AS `_timestamp_` FROM (SELECT CAST(dimensions['eventTime'] AS DATETIMEV2(6)) AS `dimensions.eventTime`, `dtEventTime`, `dtEventTimeStamp`, `events_total`, `path`, `thedate` FROM `golden_object_history`.doris WHERE `dtEventTimeStamp` >= 1784701776000 AND `dtEventTimeStamp` <= 1784702076000 AND `dtEventTime` >= '2026-07-22 14:29:36' AND `dtEventTime` <= '2026-07-22 14:34:37' AND `thedate` = '20260722' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(dimensions['eventTime'] AS DATETIMEV2(6)) AS `dimensions.eventTime`, `dtEventTime`, `dtEventTimeStamp`, `events_total`, `path`, `thedate` FROM `golden_object_current`.doris WHERE `dtEventTimeStamp` >= 1784701776000 AND `dtEventTimeStamp` <= 1784702076000 AND `dtEventTime` >= '2026-07-22 14:29:36' AND `dtEventTime` <= '2026-07-22 14:34:37' AND `thedate` = '20260722') AS combined_data ORDER BY `_timestamp_` ASC LIMIT 10
